movies.title: Inception
movies.overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O.

movies.title: The Dark Knight
movies.overview: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc on Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest tests of his ability to fight injustice.

movies.title: Pulp Fiction
movies.overview: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

movies.title: Forrest Gump
movies.overview: The history of the United States from the 1950s to the 70s unfolds through the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75.

movies.title: The Matrix
movies.overview: A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

movies.title: Interstellar
movies.overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

movies.title: The Godfather
movies.overview: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son.

movies.title: Parasite
movies.overview: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.

movies.title: Gladiator
movies.overview: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.

movies.title: The Shawshank Redemption
movies.overview: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

movies.title: Whiplash
movies.overview: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams are mentored by an instructor who will stop at nothing.

movies.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
movies.overview: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners.

movies.title: Spirited Away
movies.overview: During her family's move to the suburbs, a sullen girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits where humans are changed into beasts.

movies.title: Joker
movies.overview: A mentally troubled comedian embarks on a downward spiral that leads to the creation of an iconic villain.

movies.title: Your Name
movies.overview: Two teenagers share a profound, magical connection upon discovering they are swapping bodies. Things become even more complicated when they try to meet.

reviews.comment: Absolutely mind-bending. One of the best sci-fi films ever made.
Heath Ledger's Joker is unforgettable. A masterpiece.
